goal: 4P bot that builds an outer production factory and plays for first place
notes: Single-package 4P selector. domain_factory stores anchor/core/support/expansion as a stateful plan. In v1 it is layered conservatively onto winner_outer_domain after the early claim phase so the known winner path is not blocked.

latest_local_result.pool: sample7 + sample8 + hairate5, seat0, 15 fixed seeds
latest_local_result.interpretation: Research branch: preserves sample44's win count while adding a midgame outer-factory layer to winner_outer_domain. Forcing chain-cluster losses into domain_factory was tested and reverted because it hurt 5421622.
